description: {"description": "Leaf exhibits a simple, ovate shape with an acute apex and serrated margins. Venation appears reticulate. Leaf surface appears generally smooth, with some textural changes associated with lesions."} {"description": "Multiple, small, circular to slightly irregular lesions are present. Lesions exhibit a chlorotic halo surrounding a necrotic center. The necrotic centers are dark brown to black and appear slightly raised or scabrous. Some lesions appear coalescing."} Lesions are primarily concentrated on the lower portion of the leaf blade, with a scattered distribution. There is a tendency for lesions to follow vein patterns. Distribution is not uniform across the entire leaf surface.
